pi_items.source: Task description explicitly provides the Name as 'Blue River Technologies'
Task description explicitly provides the Code as 'BRT-001'
Task description explicitly provides the Credit Limit as '25000'
Task description explicitly provides the Email as 'accounts@blueriver.tech'
Task description explicitly provides the Billing Address containing the city 'Austin'
Task description explicitly asks to navigate to the Customers module
Task description explicitly asks to click 'New Customer'

privileged_info_summary: The customer to be created must have the Name 'Blue River Technologies', Code 'BRT-001', Credit Limit of 25000, Email 'accounts@blueriver.tech', and Billing Address containing 'Austin'. This is done in the 'customers' module using the 'new' action.
